scripts.generate-schema-doc: pip install json-schema-for-humans; generate-schema-doc --config template_name=md  schemas/v1.2.3/process.schema.json docs/README.md
scripts.generate-schema-doc-2: pip install json-schema-for-humans; generate-schema-doc --config template_name=md_nested  schemas/v2.0.0/process.schema.json docs/v2/README.md
